@startuml
package android
  class View
    interface OnClickListener
    class View
      : OnClickListener
  endpackage

  package widget
  class CompoundButton
    interface OnCheckedChangeListener
    class CompoundButton
      : OnCheckedChangeListener
  endpackage

  package view
  class View
    : OnClickListener
  endpackage

package com
  class example
    class light
      class BuildConfig
      class MainActivity
  endpackage

package androidx
  class appcompat
    class app
      class AppCompatActivity
  endpackage

class light
  : BuildConfig
  : MainActivity
  : View
  : CompoundButton

class MainActivity
  : View
  : CompoundButton

class AppCompatActivity
  : View
  : CompoundButton

class View
  : OnClickListener

class CompoundButton
  : OnCheckedChangeListener

@enduml
